name: dashboard-shell
description: App-shell layout pattern: collapsible sidebar with feature-gated nav items, sticky top bar with search/bell/avatar, mobile drawer. Wrap any page with <DashboardShell> to inherit the chrome.
postInstall: 1. Edit Sidebar.tsx navItems[] to match your routes
2. Optional: add feature toggles via a settings module so admins can hide nav items per user
3. TopBar references NotificationsBell — drop it or install the notification-bell module
